title: Extract Product Proof state helpers and redaction

decisions.label: Duplicate redact() in report.mjs not aligned with new hardening
decisions.rationale: Updated report.mjs to import redact from redaction.mjs so the hardened redaction leaf module is the single source of truth.

validationAfterReviewFixes: node tools/computer-use-e2e/run-remote-cua.mjs render-unavailable --note 'state smoke after review fixes' --run-dir /tmp/nixmac-state-unavailable-smoke
